title: Gooey Garlic Baby New Potatoes
description: A comforting Croatian stew made with baby new potatoes, garlic, and olive oil. This dish is perfect for a snack or light meal.

ingredients.name: Fresh Herbs (optional)
ingredients.notes: such as dill or parsley for added flavor

instructions: Wash and peel baby new potatoes, leaving them whole.
In a large pot, heat olive oil over medium-high heat. Add sliced garlic and sauté for about 2 minutes until fragrant but not browned.
Add baby new potatoes to the pot with their liquid (if any).
Drizzle some extra olive oil on top of the potatoes, making sure they are coated evenly.
Season with salt and pepper. If using fresh herbs, sprinkle them over the top just before serving for added freshness.
Transfer the pot with potatoes to a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake in preheated oven for about 20-25 minutes or until potatoes are tender and golden brown.
Serve hot. Optional: Garnish with fresh herbs or serve with crusty bread.
